Who We Are

Rendering Done Right

Ana Rendering is a family-run rendering business based in Melbourne, serving homeowners and builders with quality craftsmanship and reliable service.

Whether you're renovating your home's exterior, upgrading interiors with micro cement, or starting a new build, we bring the same standard of care to every job.

We supply and install all rendering materials, and stand behind our work with a quality guarantee.

Work With Us

What We Do

Our Services

From exterior renders on new builds to interior micro cement finishes, we handle every stage of the rendering process.

01
Exterior Rendering

Full exterior render for new builds and renovations. Durable, weather-resistant finishes that transform the look of your home.

02
Interior Rendering

Smooth interior walls and feature surfaces. Ideal for renovation projects looking for a modern, clean finish.

03
Micro Cement

Seamless micro cement application for floors, walls, and wet areas. A premium finish that's both stylish and hardwearing.

04
New Builds

We work directly with builders throughout Melbourne to deliver consistent, quality rendering on new residential construction.

05
Renovations

Re-render existing surfaces to a fresh standard. Fix cracks, replace damaged sections, and give your home a new look.

06
Supply & Install

We supply all materials and handle the full installation. No need to source your own products - we manage the process end to end.

FAQ

Common Questions

If you don't find what you're looking for here, get in touch and we'll be happy to help.

Ask Us Anything
Do you do micro cement? +

Yes, we offer micro cement application for both interior and exterior surfaces including floors, walls, bathrooms, kitchens, and feature areas. It's a seamless, modern finish that's highly durable.

Do you supply and install? +

Yes, we handle both supply and installation. You don't need to source your own materials. We manage the full process from product selection through to the finished result.

Do you offer a warranty on your work? +

Yes, we stand behind the quality of our work. We offer a workmanship warranty on all rendering projects. Contact us for specific warranty details relating to your project type.

Do you work with builders? +

Absolutely. We work with residential builders throughout Melbourne on new construction projects. If you're a builder looking for a reliable rendering trade, we'd love to chat.

What areas do you service? +

We service the Melbourne metropolitan area and surrounding suburbs. Get in touch with your location and we'll confirm if we cover your area.

How do I get a quote? +

Simply fill out the contact form below or call us directly. We'll arrange a time to visit your property, assess the job, and provide a clear written quote with no obligation.

Get In Touch

Fill in the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours. No obligation, no pressure - just a clear quote for your project.
